onboarding.welcomeDesc: Your AI studio for YouTube. Create videos, thumbnails and metadata — all in one place. Let us show you how it works!
onboarding.sidebarDesc: Use the sidebar to switch between sections: dashboard, editor, thumbnails, metadata and more.

settings.replayTourDesc: Replay the onboarding tour to refresh your memory of key platform features.

settings.exportDataDesc: Export all your personal data (profile, projects, assets, payouts) as a JSON file. Limited to 2 requests per hour.

settings.cookieInfo: We use PostHog and Google Analytics to understand how you use TubeForge so we can improve the product. Analytics cookies do not track personal data and can be disabled at any time.

settings.vpn.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? You can generate a new config later.
settings.vpn.proRequired: YouTube access requires a Pro or Studio plan
settings.vpn.instructions: Download the config file and import it into the WireGuard app, AmneziaVPN, or any WireGuard-compatible client.
settings.vpn.preview.title: What you get with VPN
settings.vpn.preview.feature2: Access to YouTube, Google and other services
settings.vpn.preview.feature5: Compatible with WireGuard, AmneziaVPN and others
settings.vpn.guide: How to connect VPN — step-by-step guide
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step2: Click the "Show QR Code" button above
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step3: In the WireGuard app, tap "+" → "Scan QR code"
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step4: Scan the QR code from your screen
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step5: Enable the tunnel — YouTube is available! 🎉
settings.vpn.guide.desktop.step3: In WireGuard, click "Import Tunnel" → select the tubeforge-vpn.conf file
settings.vpn.guide.amnezia.step3: In Amnezia: "Add server" → "From file" → select tubeforge-vpn.conf

toolshub.title: Tools Studio
toolshub.subtitle: Choose a tool for your task — from video generation to SEO optimization
toolshub.tryDifferent: Try a different query or category
toolshub.tool.video.name: Video Generation
toolshub.tool.video.subtitle: AI · Runway ML
toolshub.tool.video.description: Create video from text prompts using Runway ML Gen-3 Alpha. Control scenes, models and effects.
toolshub.tool.thumbnails.name: Thumbnail Editor
toolshub.tool.thumbnails.description: Full-featured canvas editor like Canva. Text, shapes, images, AI thumbnail generation.
toolshub.tool.metadata.name: SEO Metadata
toolshub.tool.metadata.subtitle: AI · Claude
toolshub.tool.metadata.description: Optimize video title, description and tags. AI analyzes trends and generates SEO content.
toolshub.tool.preview.name: Preview & Publish
toolshub.tool.preview.subtitle: YouTube · Publishing
toolshub.tool.preview.description: Check the final result and upload video directly to YouTube. Schedule publications.
toolshub.tool.image-generator.subtitle: DALL-E 3 · AI
toolshub.tool.image-generator.descriptio: Generate high-quality images with AI in seconds. Presets, styles, prompt generator.
toolshub.tool.voiceover-generator.descri: Create quality voiceovers with 50+ narrators in seconds. Multilingual support.
toolshub.tool.speech-enhancer.subtitle: Audio · AI
toolshub.tool.speech-enhancer.descriptio: Enhance audio/video quality with AI. Noise removal, echo, normalization.
toolshub.tool.veo3-generator.subtitle: VEO3 · AI
toolshub.tool.veo3-generator.description: Create videos with AI. Prompt → video clip in seconds. Cinematic style.
toolshub.tool.brainstormer.subtitle: Ideas · GPT
toolshub.tool.brainstormer.description: Generate content ideas with AI. Trend analysis, target audience, potential assessment.
toolshub.tool.vocal-remover.subtitle: Separation · AI
toolshub.tool.vocal-remover.description: Separate vocals and instrumentals from any audio file. High quality separation.
toolshub.tool.ai-creator.subtitle: Avatar · AI
toolshub.tool.ai-creator.description: Become an AI content creator in 3 steps. Upload photo, choose voice, write script.
toolshub.tool.autoclip.subtitle: Viral clips · AI
toolshub.tool.autoclip.description: Turn long videos into viral clips automatically. AI finds the most interesting moments.
toolshub.tool.cut-crop.subtitle: Cut · Merge
toolshub.tool.cut-crop.description: Cut and merge videos. Crop for any format — YouTube, Shorts, TikTok, Instagram.
toolshub.tool.subtitle-editor.subtitle: Styles · Animation
toolshub.tool.subtitle-editor.descriptio: Full subtitle editor. 12+ text styles, frame-by-frame animation, SRT export. One-word mode.
toolshub.tool.subtitle-remover.subtitle: Removal · AI
toolshub.tool.subtitle-remover.descripti: Remove subtitles from any video with AI. Auto detection and background restoration.
toolshub.tool.reddit-video.description: Generate Reddit-style videos for Shorts/TikTok. Voiceover, background video, auto editing.
toolshub.tool.fake-texts.subtitle: Chat · Video
toolshub.tool.fake-texts.description: Create fake chat videos. iMessage, WhatsApp, Telegram styles. Typing animation.
toolshub.tool.youtube-downloader.descrip: Analyze any YouTube video: structure, hook, engagement, tips for improvement.
toolshub.tool.tiktok-downloader.subtitle: Download · TikTok
toolshub.tool.tiktok-downloader.descript: Download TikTok videos without watermark. HD quality, MP4 and MP3.
toolshub.tool.audio-balancer.subtitle: Balance · Channels
toolshub.tool.audio-balancer.description: Balance left and right audio channels. Individual volume control for each channel.
toolshub.tool.video-compressor.subtitle: Compression · Optimization
toolshub.tool.video-compressor.descripti: Compress video files without quality loss. Resolution and target size selection.
toolshub.tool.mp3-converter.subtitle: Converter · Audio
toolshub.tool.mp3-converter.description: Convert any media file to MP3. Bitrate selection, trimming, quality settings.
toolshub.tool.background-remover.descrip: Remove background from any image. Replace with transparent, solid color, gradient or your image.
toolshub.tool.voice-changer.subtitle: Voice · Effects
toolshub.tool.voice-changer.description: Change voice in any audio or video file. 11+ effects: robot, echo, whisper, and more.
toolshub.tool.face-swap.subtitle: Face · AI
toolshub.tool.face-swap.description: Swap faces on photos or video with AI. High quality, natural result.
toolshub.tool.scenario.name: AI Scenario
toolshub.tool.scenario.subtitle: AI · GPT-4o
toolshub.tool.scenario.description: Write a professional video script with AI. Structure, timings, shooting tips.
toolshub.tool.translate.name: Auto Translate
toolshub.tool.translate.subtitle: AI · Multilingual
toolshub.tool.translate.description: Automatic video translation to 30+ languages. Dubbing, subtitles, content localization.
toolshub.tool.analytics.name: YouTube Analytics
toolshub.tool.analytics.description: Detailed channel analytics: views, subscribers, CTR, retention. Competitor comparison.
toolshub.tool.content-planner.subtitle: Calendar · Ideas · Templates
toolshub.tool.content-planner.descriptio: Plan, schedule, and organize your content across all platforms with calendar, ideas bank, and templates.
toolshub.tool.ai-video-generator.descrip: Turn any script into a fully rendered video with animated scenes, voiceover, and transitions.
toolshub.tool.scheduler.name: Content Scheduler
toolshub.tool.scheduler.subtitle: Calendar · Auto
toolshub.tool.scheduler.description: Schedule publications for the week ahead. Optimal time, video series, content plan.
